South Africa pushed Miller over Stubbs to keep a left-hander at the crease since Quinton got out but Miller has thrown it away. Nothing great about this ball though. Regulation flighted delivery, probably stopped on the batter and it's a straight chip for an easy return catch. Can USA get back into this game with this momentum?

full_text: Harmeet Singh to de Kock, Caught by S Jahangir at deep mid-wicket!! They have been feeding full tosses to Quinton and one has eventually bought them a wicket and it's the big fish too. Hang on, they are checking the height on that one. "Satisfied, that's a fair delivery" says third ump Joel Wilson. QdK tried to smash that hit-me ball for six but it took a well judged catch very close to the rope to send him back. Jahangir had to control his momentum and ensure he didn't step on the rope and he was great. Quinton walks back after a great hand.

full_text: Nortje to Corey Anderson, Bowled!! Six and gone. 91 mph delivery, fuller and attacking the sticks. The batter backed away, exposed his sticks but missed the line of the delivery to be clean bowled. USA needed him to fire but he has to go. Huge wicket indeed for SA. Fourth one down and USA finding it tough to stay afloat in this game. SA getting wickets at regular intervals.
